title: myosotis palustris subsp. laxiflora
intro: Myosotis palustris subsp. laxiflora is a subspecies of forget-me-not, a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of Myosotis palustris subsp. laxiflora include its potential to soothe coughs, calm bronchitis, and reduce fever, making it a natural remedy for various respiratory ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
